root.rep_text: -> รายงานเคลื่อนไหวหุ้น
root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_amount ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no) AS member_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.doc_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.sign_flag ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as operate_date FROM sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename ,sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type ,sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE (sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code) -- AND (sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no) AND (sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no) --( (sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date between to_date('2025-7-1 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and to_date('2025-7-31 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no ASC ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no ASC
